title: Resource Cost Analysis

banner.title: About Cost Data
banner.description: Costs shown here are estimates based on Kubernetes resource requests (CPU / memory), not actual cloud billing. For accurate billing data, integrate your cloud provider's billing API.

overview.noData: No snapshot data for this month. Please configure Prometheus.
overview.noDataDesc: Configure pricing and ensure Prometheus is running to start collecting cost snapshots.

config.title: Pricing Configuration
config.hint: Cost = CPU (cores) × hours × price + Memory (GiB) × hours × price

capacityTrend.noData: No historical snapshot data yet. CostWorker captures daily at 00:05 UTC. After connection, trends will be visible the next day.

wasteResources.alertMessage: The following workloads have CPU efficiency below 20%, indicating that requested resources far exceed actual usage. Consider reducing CPU requests.
wasteResources.emptyNoMetrics: Efficiency analysis requires Prometheus monitoring data to identify underutilized workloads

prometheusRequired: Prometheus is required for actual usage data. Without it, only resource requests are estimated.

occupancy.efficiencyNoMetrics: Efficiency analysis requires Prometheus metrics. Showing occupancy data only. Please configure Prometheus in cluster monitoring settings.
occupancy.nsEfficiency: Namespace Efficiency Distribution (CPU Efficiency vs Memory Efficiency)
occupancy.quadrantHighOccupancyLowEff: High Occupancy Low Efficiency: Over-provisioned, reduce requests
occupancy.quadrantHighOccupancyHighEff: High Occupancy High Efficiency: Healthy, consider capacity expansion
occupancy.quadrantLowOccupancyLowEff: Low Occupancy Low Efficiency: Idle resources, consider scaling down
occupancy.quadrantLowOccupancyHighEff: Low Occupancy High Efficiency: Good performance, ample resources
occupancy.bubbleDesc: Bubble size = CPU Occupancy % (larger = more cluster capacity used)

billing.secretSet: Already set, leave blank to keep existing
billing.savedKeepOriginal: Already set (leave blank to keep existing)
billing.emptyData: No billing data yet. Please sync first.

insights.title: Cost Insights
insights.subtitle: Cross-Cluster Cost Summary
insights.noData: No cross-cluster cost data yet. Configure pricing in each cluster's Cost Analysis page.
